display.purpose: Panel titles and empty-state headlines only.

title.purpose: Song names in rows; the loudest text in the main view.

label.purpose: Machine facts: paths, dates, sizes, BPM, counts, kbd hints.

shadows.name: hairline-ring
shadows.purpose: Resting edge for inputs and controls; a crisp outline, not a lift.

shadows.name: floating-layer
shadows.purpose: Context menus, ⌘F palette, side panels. Reserved for true overlays.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Default for hover/active state changes on controls and rows.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one filled action per surface: Add folder, Combine, Download.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #fff; background: #0a84ff; border: 1px solid #0a84ff; border-radius: 9px; padding: 8px 14px; cursor: pointer; line-height: 1; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(10,132,255,.3); transition: background .12s, border-color .12s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0a78ec; border-color: #0a78ec; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Default secondary action; quiet until hovered.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #6e6e73; background: transparent; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 9px; padding: 8px 10px; cursor: pointer; line-height: 1; transition: background .12s, color .12s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(0,0,0,.05); color: #1d1d1f; }

components.name: Song Row
components.description: The atomic unit of the library: play control, format tag, title, mono path, meta column.
components.html: ▶WAVNight DriveProductions / Night Drive / BouncesJun 27, 202648.2 MB
components.css: .ds-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e6e6eb; border-radius: 12px; padding: 11px 14px 11px 12px; cursor: pointer; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Helvetica, sans-serif; transition: border-color .12s, background .12s; } .ds-row:hover { background: #fbfbfd; border-color: #d6d6dc; box-shadow: 0 0 0 .5px rgba(0,0,0,.035), 0 1px 1.5px rgba(0,0,0,.05); } .ds-row-play { width: 34px; height: 34px; flex-shrink: 0; display: grid; place-items: center; border-radius: 50%; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #d6d6dc; color: #6e6e73; font-size: 11px; transition: color .12s, border-color .12s, transform .12s; } .ds-row:hover .ds-row-play { color: #0a84ff; border-color: #0a84ff; } .ds-row-tag { font-family: 'SF Mono', ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 9.5px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .05em; padding: 4px 7px; border-radius: 6px; color: #0a84ff; background: rgba(10,132,255,.1); border: 1px solid rgba(10,132,255,.2); } .ds-row-file { min-width: 0; flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 3px; } .ds-row-name { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -.01em; color: #1d1d1f; } .ds-row-path { font-family: 'SF Mono', ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #98989f; } .ds-row-meta { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-end; gap: 2px; font-family: 'SF Mono', ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 11.5px; color: #6e6e73; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-row-size { font-size: 10.5px; color: #98989f; }

components.name: Metadata Chip
components.description: Mono micro-chip for BPM / INST / VOX facts on a row.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: 'SF Mono', ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 9.5px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .02em; padding: 3px 6px; border-radius: 6px; color: #6e6e73; background: #f0f0f3; border: 1px solid #e6e6eb; } .ds-chip-inst { color: #0a84ff; background: rgba(10,132,255,.1); border-color: rgba(10,132,255,.22); } .ds-chip-vox { color: #b06b00; background: rgba(224,146,47,.12); border-color: rgba(224,146,47,.26); }

components.name: Search Field
components.description: The main library search with token support (bpm: / type: / context:).
components.html: <input class="ds-input-search" type="text" placeholder="Search every song by name or path…" />
components.css: .ds-input-search { width: 100%; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #1d1d1f; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #d6d6dc; border-radius: 11px; padding: 11px 14px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(60,45,25,.06) inset; } .ds-input-search::placeholder { color: #98989f; } .ds-input-search:focus { outline: none; border-color: #0a84ff; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(10,132,255,.16); }

components.name: Sidebar Item
components.description: Library navigation row with count; active state is a Signal Blue wash.
components.html:
All songs128
Starred12
components.css: .ds-side { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; width: 200px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Helvetica, sans-serif; } .ds-side-item { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 9px; padding: 6px 8px; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; font-size: 13px; color: #1d1d1f; } .ds-side-item:hover { background: #f0f0f3; } .ds-side-active, .ds-side-active:hover { background: rgba(10,132,255,.12); color: #0a84ff; font-weight: 600; } .ds-side-ct { font-family: 'SF Mono', ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 10.5px; color: #98989f; } .ds-side-active .ds-side-ct { color: #0a84ff; }

narrative.overview: WavCave's interface is shelving: it holds the user's music and otherwise disappears. The system speaks fluent macOS (system font stacks, system light and dark, system blue) so the app reads as something Apple could have preinstalled, not as a web page in a window. Density is moderate and list-driven; a row of the library is the atomic unit of the whole product. The system explicitly rejects web-app-in-a-window SaaS chrome, pro-audio skeuomorphism, and iTunes-era clutter. Controls are quiet and precise: they whisper at rest, reveal on hover, and answer instantly.
keyCharacteristics: Native macOS voice: system fonts, system blue, honest light/dark themes
List-first density; the song row is the atomic unit
Flat surfaces with hairline borders; shadows only when something floats
One accent color carries every interactive and now-playing signal

rules.name: The One Blue Rule
rules.body: Signal Blue is the only color allowed to mean "interactive" or "playing". Never introduce a second interactive hue; never use Signal Blue decoratively.

rules.name: The System Voice Rule
rules.body: Never load a webfont. If the type doesn't ship with macOS, it doesn't ship with WavCave.

rules.name: The Mono-Means-Data Rule
rules.body: SF Mono is reserved for machine facts (paths, timestamps, counts, BPM). Prose and controls stay in the system sans.

rules.name: The Hairline Rule
rules.body: If it doesn't float, it doesn't cast. Rows, cards, and bars get borders and tints; only overlays get shadows.

dos: Do route every interactive signal through Signal Blue (#0a84ff); rarity and consistency are what make it legible.
Do keep both themes first-class: every new surface ships with its dark values (#1c1c1e / #2c2c2e family) in the same change.
Do use hover-reveal for secondary row actions; the row at rest shows only what identifies the song.
Do keep transitions at 0.12s ease-out; state feedback, not choreography, and respect prefers-reduced-motion.
Do put machine facts (paths, dates, BPM, counts) in SF Mono at label size.
donts: Don't build "web-app-in-a-window": no SaaS dashboard chrome, no card grids, no gradients, no marketing sections inside the app.
Don't reach for pro-audio skeuomorphism: no knobs, brushed metal, fake LEDs, or cramped plugin-UI density.
Don't recreate iTunes-era clutter: one job per surface; secondary actions live in context menus and hover reveals, not in ever-growing toolbars.
Don't load webfonts, use #000/#fff raw in new work, or add colored side-stripe borders, gradient text, or glassmorphism.
Don't cast shadows on resting surfaces. If it looks lifted but doesn't float, the Hairline Rule is being broken.
